title: hieracium phaeotrichum
intro: Hieracium phaeotrichum, also known as Yellow Hawkweed, is a flowering plant species of the dandelion-like hawkweed family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. Medicinally, Hieracium phaeotrichum is valued for its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and promote wound healing. It can be prepared into herbal infusions, tinctures, or salves, which are used to treat various health issues, such as digestive problems, skin irritations, and respiratory issues.
